Accommodation guide · 2025

Girls PG near Deogiri College, Osmanpura — what parents need to know

0.8 km from campus From ₹2,999/month

Finding the right PG accommodation near Deogiri College in Osmanpura is one of the most important decisions a family makes when their daughter joins college in Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar. With hundreds of students enrolling each year at Deogiri College of Arts, Science and Commerce and at DIEMS Engineering College, the demand for safe, affordable, and well-supervised girls PG accommodation close to campus is higher than ever.

Why proximity to Deogiri College matters

Students who live within walking distance of their college spend less time commuting and more time studying, resting, and building peer connections. At Jyoti Girls PG, we are located just 0.8 km from Deogiri College — a comfortable 10-minute walk through well-lit, familiar streets in Jyoti Nagar, Osmanpura.

This means no daily auto-rickshaw expense, no waiting at bus stops, and no anxiety for parents about late-night travel. Residents walk home safely after evening lectures and coaching sessions, with caretaker confirmation at arrival.

What makes Jyoti Girls PG different

  • Only girls PG in Osmanpura with 24x7 resident female warden on-site
  • No bunk beds — proper single beds with personal wardrobe and study desk in every room
  • CCTV in all common areas with strict visitor log maintained daily
  • High-speed Wi-Fi and 24x7 power backup — no study disruptions
  • Transparent pricing — twin sharing ₹5,000/month, standard sharing ₹2,999/month

Pricing and room options

We offer two room types designed for different needs and budgets:

  • Twin sharing — ₹5,000/month: Two residents per room, more personal space, quieter environment. Ideal for students who value privacy.
  • Standard sharing — ₹2,999/month: Three to four residents per room, best value option, lively social environment. Most popular among first-year students.

Both options include high-speed Wi-Fi, power backup, housekeeping support, and 24x7 female supervision. Meals are available through a nearby tiffin service.

Safety standards that parents trust

At Jyoti Girls PG, safety is not an afterthought. Our resident warden is on-site round the clock. All entries and exits are logged in a digital register, and parents receive updates for any late-night movement. CCTV cameras cover all common areas, staircases, and corridors. Visitors are logged and accompanied at all times.

Emergency protocols include fire drills, first-aid kits on every floor, and tie-ups with nearby Osmanpura clinics for medical assistance.

How to check availability

Beds at Jyoti Girls PG fill up quickly before each academic year. We recommend reaching out at least two months before your joining date. You can WhatsApp us directly, call on +91 99223 33305, or use the availability check form on this page.

We are happy to schedule an in-person walkthrough so parents can see the rooms, meet the warden, and confirm security arrangements before making a decision.
